data.content: Plan needs revision before implementation. The current plan is not aligned with the existing UI surface: the active-item overview is the inline summary grid in src/components/beat-table-summary.tsx:154-197, not the table column list in src/components/beat-columns.tsx:44-66. The revised plan should target InlineSummary, insert Acceptance criteria immediately after Description, include acceptance in the visibility guard, expand the grid to four columns, and test the overview layout/order/content on narrow viewports.
